title: helenium vernale
intro: Helenium vernale, also known as Eastern Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, its leaves, flowers, and roots have been used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Helenium vernale is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
